test-case.name: CloseSettings_ShouldReturnToPreviousState
test-case.output: [GameStateManager] State changed: Loading -> Playing [GameStateManager] State changed: Playing -> Settings [GameStateManager] State changed: Settings -> Playing

test-case.name: IsInMenu_WhenSettings_ShouldBeTrue
test-case.output: [GameStateManager] State changed: Loading -> Playing [GameStateManager] State changed: Playing -> Settings

test-case.name: IsPaused_WhenPaused_ShouldBeTrue
test-case.output: [GameStateManager] State changed: Loading -> Playing [GameStateManager] State changed: Playing -> Paused

test-case.name: IsPaused_WhenSettings_ShouldBeTrue
test-case.output: [GameStateManager] State changed: Loading -> Playing [GameStateManager] State changed: Playing -> Settings

test-case.name: IsPlayable_WhenPaused_ShouldBeFalse
test-case.output: [GameStateManager] State changed: Loading -> Playing [GameStateManager] State changed: Playing -> Paused

test-case.name: OpenSettings_FromPlaying_ShouldSucceed
test-case.output: [GameStateManager] State changed: Loading -> Playing [GameStateManager] State changed: Playing -> Settings

test-case.name: Pause_WhenPlaying_ShouldTransitionToPaused
test-case.output: [GameStateManager] State changed: Loading -> Playing [GameStateManager] State changed: Playing -> Paused

test-case.name: PreviousState_AfterTransition_ShouldBeOldState
test-case.output: [GameStateManager] State changed: Loading -> Playing [GameStateManager] State changed: Playing -> Paused

test-case.name: Resume_WhenPaused_ShouldTransitionToPlaying
test-case.output: [GameStateManager] State changed: Loading -> Playing [GameStateManager] State changed: Playing -> Paused [GameStateManager] State changed: Paused -> Playing

test-case.name: ReturnToPreviousState_ShouldRestorePreviousState
test-case.output: [GameStateManager] State changed: Loading -> Playing [GameStateManager] State changed: Playing -> Paused [GameStateManager] State changed: Paused -> Playing

test-case.name: SetOnlineStatus_ToTrue_ShouldUpdateIsOnline
test-case.output: [GameStateManager] Online status set to: False [GameStateManager] Online status set to: True

test-case.name: TrySetState_FromPausedToPlaying_ShouldSucceed
test-case.output: [GameStateManager] State changed: Loading -> Playing [GameStateManager] State changed: Playing -> Paused [GameStateManager] State changed: Paused -> Playing

test-case.name: TrySetState_FromPlayingToPaused_ShouldSucceed
test-case.output: [GameStateManager] State changed: Loading -> Playing [GameStateManager] State changed: Playing -> Paused

test-case.name: TrySetState_FromPlayingToResults_ShouldSucceed
test-case.output: [GameStateManager] State changed: Loading -> Playing [GameStateManager] State changed: Playing -> Results

test-case.name: TrySetState_FromPlayingToSettings_ShouldSucceed
test-case.output: [GameStateManager] State changed: Loading -> Playing [GameStateManager] State changed: Playing -> Settings

test-case.name: TrySetState_FromResultsToPaused_ShouldFail
test-case.output: [GameStateManager] State changed: Loading -> Playing [GameStateManager] State changed: Playing -> Results [GameStateManager] Invalid transition: Results -> Paused

test-case.name: TrySetState_FromResultsToPlaying_ShouldSucceed
test-case.output: [GameStateManager] State changed: Loading -> Playing [GameStateManager] State changed: Playing -> Results [GameStateManager] State changed: Results -> Playing

test-case.name: TrySetState_ToSameState_ShouldReturnTrueWithoutChange
test-case.output: [GameStateManager] State changed: Loading -> Playing [GameStateManager] Already in state Playing
